text_block_list.text: The Oaks, the second race of the Tiara route, demands not only speed, but stamina as well. This is not the race that decides the fastest, but the strongest.

The race was already drawing massive
attention to begin with. Especially after
Red Desire's dramatic declaration…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Then, let us meet again at the Oaks.
May the blessings of the saint be upon you all…

The excitement only intensified further. By race
day, the energy surrounding the event had
reached a fever pitch.

text_block_list.name: Race Fan A
text_block_list.text:
This year's Oaks might end up being just as
hype as the Japan Derby!

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista versus Red Desire, now that's a
rivalry to get fired up over! This is going to be
so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of the rivalry between Daiwa
Scarlet and Vodka! Man, that was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Race Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you can't help expecting another clash
like that! Those two never got to face each
other in the Oaks, either… so this year's race
is gonna be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Hey, did you see The 1st? That fan voting site where people pick who they're backing each race. Buena ranked first for the Oaks too!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Right? She's super popular!
I even voted for Buena myself.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Her run in the Oka Sho was amazing too!
She's definitely going to— …Ah!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
It's Buena Vista!
Buena Vistaaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"We're counting on an amazing race!"
"Go win this thing!"
"Buena, good luckkkk!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …! Ahh…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone!
I'll give it everything I've got today too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah… That was incredible…!
choice_data_list: You okay? You looked like you were shaking…
You okay? You looked like you were shaking…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay.
That was just… me getting fired up!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
All those expectations everyone's carrying
for me… they really got my blood pumping!
choice_data_list: So it was battle nerves, huh?
So it was battle nerves, huh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe.
That might sound a little too cool, though.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I want to take everyone's feelings with me…
turn them into strength… and win.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So from you, too… can I have some?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thanks!
But… one more thing.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I want to hear something special, something
just from you. Can I?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah!
I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Bueenaaa!  
Buenaaa Vistaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl A
text_block_list.text:
…H-Hey, this is kinda hard to deal with!
The cheers for Buena are way too loud…!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl B
text_block_list.text:
What is this overwhelming heroine aura…?
Ugh, we've all been working just as hard…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much for your support!
Today, I'll give it everything I've—

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Hey… what's up with Desire?
Is she, like… focusing or something…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Desire…?)

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Tokyo. 2400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the Oka Sho, the greatest
uncertainty lies in adapting to the sudden
increase in distance…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Countless horsegirls have fallen before this
wall, abandoning their dreams of the beautiful
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Is this, too, a trial bestowed upon us by the
world? No—

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Rather, it is a blessing from something divine.
Because for me… it is ideal.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
The Oaks is a gift. The longer the distance,
the more my true nature reveals itself…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …just like that person I admire.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (…! For a moment… it felt like I saw someone—)

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Yes… I was chosen to stand here. This race
will unfold differently from the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Today will surely become a touchstone…
for reaching that distant place.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: Buena. I will arrive at that place. Won't you bear witness to it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Sorry.
I can't do that.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I thought about it a lot. You have a world you
want to reach. And getting in your way… that
really hurts.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But… if we're talking about the one we admire,
then I have something I can't give up either!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Tokyo, 2400 meters… It's the same course
where Spe won the Japan Cup…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It's where our dream, that beautiful view we're
chasing—began.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to make that dream come true,
then there's no way I can lose here!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Ahh… those eyes, shining with such
unwavering resolve! That is the very proof of
this world's chosen protagonist…!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
You are Schwarz, and I am Weiss.
Black and white shall collide—

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
And in the end, I will illuminate everything
with the saint's light…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I won't let that happen.
I told you I'm ready, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle this head-on!
—Give me a good race!
